title: China will never renounce the right to use force over Taiwan, says Xi Jinping
description: Xi Jinping made the comments in his opening speech at the ruling Communist Party's 20th party congress in Beijing.
keywords: 20th Communist Party of China, Chinese President Xi Jinping, Xi Jinping speech at 20th Communist Party of China, 20th CPC
